posture: 39 roles · 14 strong-act · afternoon refresh adds two fresh strong matches — a recruiter-held CFO (Moir Group) and a Regional Director of Governance, Risk & Compliance ANZ (OneSchool Global) — on top of the still-live recruiter-held senior risk/compliance surface (Robert Half SM Risk & Compliance x2, Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract, Shippit interim FC); senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches
summary: Afternoon refresh (13:15 AEST), browser-verified on Seek and Robert Half. All still-live morning items were carried forward (recruiter-held Robert Half senior risk/compliance roles re-checked live; the Peninsula Head of Compliance & Risk, Talent Senior Finance Manager, Cuscal contract and Shippit interim FC all still open) and this run adds a fresh afternoon wave: a Moir Group-held CFO for a purpose-led org, a OneSchool Global Regional Director of Governance, Risk & Compliance (ANZ), a Senior Internal Audit Manager via Ethos BeathChapman, a Controls & Design Assurance Manager at Anglicare, an Environmental Risk & Assurance Lead (a rare overlap with your Environmental Law background), and an Operational Risk Analyst held by §1a recruiter JS Careers. A search hit for a WaterNSW Head of Risk, Compliance & Audit was checked and excluded — that WORK180 listing is closed (posted ~a year ago). Recruiter-held senior-manager risk/governance and interim/contract roles remain the time-critical surface, so being CV-current and registered with the risk/finance specialists (Bluefin, Kaizen, JS Careers, KPP, Robert Half, Sharp & Carter) matters. Seek and Robert Half were browser-verified this run; I Work for NSW, Board Direction and AICD DO (member-gated) were covered via search-assisted discovery, so a manual look at those desks remains worthwhile.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government prequalification scheme through which agencies appoint independent chairs and members to their audit and risk committees.
items.so_what: Direct fit for your FCPA/FAICD audit-and-risk-committee profile and existing NED experience; register on the panel to be drawn on as agencies refresh committees.

items.headline: Company Secretary — The Skin Hospital, Darlinghurst (Sydney)
items.summary: Board-level company secretary for a not-for-profit specialist hospital, covering governance, board papers and statutory compliance.
items.so_what: Governance/company-secretary fit close to your board background; still live from earlier this week.

items.headline: Company Secretary — recruiter-held, Sydney (Profusion PAC)
items.summary: Recruiter-managed company secretary role for a Sydney organisation, focused on board governance and statutory duties.
items.so_what: Another company-secretary option matching your governance/NED experience; recruiter-held, so register interest directly.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director & committee vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Aggregated board/NED and committee vacancies nationally, added daily; the platform notes a fresh batch of roles across education, environment, housing, community, aged care and professional services this week.
items.so_what: Browse for risk/audit-committee and energy/local-government boards that suit an interstate-travel cadence; situational awareness rather than a single role.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's member-only Directorship Opportunities board adds roughly 15 roles a week; only public teasers are visible here.
items.so_what: As an FAICD, worth a manual login to DO — the strongest board supply is behind this gate and not visible to this scan.

items.headline: Chief Financial Officer — purpose-led organisation, Sydney (Hybrid) (Moir Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent CFO owning the finance function — strategy, planning, reporting, treasury, investments, statutory reporting and governance/risk — for a values-driven Sydney organisation, partnering the board and executive team.
items.so_what: Strong direct CFO match to your FCPA finance-leadership profile with an explicit governance/risk remit; recruiter-held and fresh this afternoon — contact Moir Group early.

items.headline: Executive Director, Finance & Corporate Services — CatholicCare, Lewisham (Sydney)
items.summary: Permanent CFO-equivalent executive leading finance and corporate services for a large Sydney not-for-profit; full-time, on-site/hybrid in the inner-west.
items.so_what: Strong direct match to your CFO/COO-track finance leadership and FCPA credential in an NFP setting; still live (closes ~14 Jul) — move early.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent CRO building and owning the enterprise risk and compliance framework for a large registered club group.
items.so_what: Direct CRO match in Sydney metro suited to your risk leadership; still live and a standout C-suite opening.

items.summary: Senior GM accountable for a general-insurance portfolio at the NSW statutory insurer.
items.so_what: Strong insurance/government sector fit and executive level; lean is operational insurance-line leadership, so weigh against your risk/finance core.

items.summary: Director-level leader owning governance, risk, compliance, privacy, work health & safety and legal oversight across the Australia/New Zealand regions of an international education group.
items.so_what: Direct senior GRC leadership match for your FAICD/governance strength at director level; fresh this afternoon — a standout on-function opening, move early.
